summary: DPA page displays correct content structure with proper headings, effective date, and sections as required by spec. Minor brand consistency issues with typography weight and background color usage.

violations.description: Page background appears to be white/neutral instead of the required diner teal (#9fd8d2) for public marketing pages or cream (#fff8ea) for legal pages
Primary heading 'Data Processing Addendum' does not appear to use black weight (font-black, 900) as required for primary public headings

actions: Apply correct diner palette background color - either teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea for legal content
Increase font-weight of main heading to black/900 to match diner typography requirements
Verify all section headings follow the typography hierarchy defined in manifesto
